description: The project is located in the heart of Chengdu's future core area, with a focus on the 'Urban Forest' concept. The 30-meter-tall glass dome spans 15,000 square meters, integrating landscape, architecture, and sustainability to create a new urban landmark.
highlights: Urban forest concept integrating landscape, architecture and sustainability
Located in Chengdu's future core area

description: This packaging design draws inspiration from traditional Chinese cultural elements. By integrating modern aesthetic principles, it creates a unique visual identity that captures the essence of Baijiu culture.
highlights: Modern interpretation of traditional Chinese cultural elements
Unique visual identity reflecting Baijiu culture

studio: Baidu Online Network Technology (Beijing) Co., Ltd.
description: An innovative mobile application designed to assist visually impaired users by connecting them with sighted volunteers through real-time video assistance, providing unprecedented independence in daily life.
highlights: Real-time video connection between visually impaired users and sighted volunteers

description: NISSAN NX8 represents a breakthrough in intelligent driving technology, featuring advanced autonomous capabilities and a design language that redefines the relationship between vehicles and users.
